page.content: In the 3rd Quarter 2023 report for Spotify Technology within the Media & Entertainment sector, the total revenue amounted to $250M. The revenue breakdown reveals that streaming licenses generated $150M, while content syndication contributed $100M. Additionally, podcast licensing accounted for $70M, and broadcast rights provided $30M. Music publishing yielded $50M alongside advertising revenue of $20M. Merchandising brought in $10M, leading to a total growth of 15%. Year-over-year, Q32022 revenue was $200M, marking a year-over-year growth of 25%. In terms of royalty rates, the category breakdown shows that pop artists receive a rate of 0.007% for 1,000,000 streams, resulting in a revenue of $7,000. Rock artists earn 0.005% for 800,000 streams, generating $4,000. Hip-hop artists receive a rate of 0.009% for 1,200,000 streams, leading to $10,800 in revenue.
